title: cyrtochilum phylloglossum
intro: Cyrtochilum phylloglossum, also known as the Phylloglossum orchid or the strap-leaf orchid, is a species of orchid native to South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which are said to include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cyrtochilum phylloglossum are believed to include relief from digestive issues and wound healing, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, Cyrtochilum phylloglossum is often used in infusions or decoctions, and its roots are sometimes dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
